##SOURCE=Michael Scott S101092, Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Dark steel gray metallic prismatic crystals with striation parallel to the c-axis. About ten percent of the volume is andorite IV, as determined by X-ray diffraction.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060673
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, about ten percent of volume is andorite IV, a = 13.0128(9), b = 19.175(2), c = 17.090(2), V = 4264.3(6) as determined on a single-crystal.
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 13.0225 b: 19.187 c: 25.645 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 6407.8 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
